summary: Attempted to test Astra Vision demo mode functionality but encountered critical deployment issue. Application shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' error on external URL, preventing all frontend and integration testing. Backend APIs work perfectly locally but are inaccessible externally.

critical_bugs.issue: External URL returns 404 for all API endpoints while backend works locally
critical_bugs.impact: Complete external API failure - no access to backend through public URL
critical_bugs.details: Backend server is running (supervisor shows RUNNING status) and responds correctly to local requests (curl localhost:8001/api/health works), but external URL https://ai-dev-brain-cferxrtx.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404. This suggests routing/proxy configuration issue.

working_locally.status: ✅ Working locally - Returns correct health status
working_locally.response_format: Correct JSON with status and service fields

working_locally.status: ✅ Backend server running and accessible locally
working_locally.details: Supervisor logs show successful API calls with 200/400 responses as expected

critical_bugs.issue: Application deployment shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' error page
critical_bugs.impact: Complete frontend failure - cannot access React application
critical_bugs.details: External URL shows deployment error: 'Our Agent is resting after inactivity. Visit app.emergent.sh and restart the app to wake it up and restore your preview.' Cannot test demo mode functionality, Try Demo Repository button, file tree, Monaco editor, or any AI features.

untested_features.feature: Demo mode file tree (src/app.js, src/utils.js, package.json)
Monaco editor with demo file content
AI buttons (Explain Code, Explain Error, Generate Flow) with demo content
GitHub API fallback to demo mode

passed_tests: Backend server is running locally (supervisor status: RUNNING)
Backend health endpoint works locally (curl localhost:8001/api/health)
Backend logs show successful API responses locally
All required demo mode code is present in App.js (MOCK_REPO_FILES, MOCK_REPO_TREE, loadDemoRepo function)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Application deployment is down. External URL shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' error. Backend works locally but external routing is broken (404 for all API calls). Need to restart/fix the application deployment immediately. Cannot test any demo mode functionality until deployment is restored. Visit app.emergent.sh to restart the app as suggested by the error message.
